title: JOMO No-Loss Pool
subtitle: Pack crypto, forget the noise. Waka with chest go your goal!
aboutDesc: JOMO No-Loss Pool na decentralized protocol wey dem build for the Crypto JOMO community. E dey use liquid staking (LiNEAR) to make profit (yield) on top NEAR wey you deposit. The profit wey enter, dem go gather am together draw raffle for participants, while everybody still hold 100% of their original deposit. No risk to lose your money at all!
nextDraw: Time wey remain for next draw
totalWon: Total money dem don share give players:
emptyHistory: History still empty. Make you be the first winner! 🍀
verifyExplorer: Check the history for NEAR Explorer →
transparencyDesc: JOMO Pool na decentralized app. Every deposit, yield wey enter, and jackpot draw dey permanently recorded for NEAR blockchain.
automationDesc: Our draws dey happen on-chain. Na smart contract dey automatically share the profit, to make sure say 100% fairness dey.
howItWorksTitle: How this No-Loss Pool dey work? 💡
step1Desc: Deposit at least 10 NEAR. Your money na your ticket. The more your balance big, the more your chance to win jackpot.
step2Desc: The smart contract go send all the pool money go LiNEAR liquid staking, where e go continuously dey make interest ({{apy}} APY). Your main money dey always safe.
step3Desc: Computer go randomly choose one winner wey go pack 97% of all the yield wey the pool gather. You no win? You no lose anything and you still dey inside the next draw!
exampleText: Imagine say the total pool na 10,000 NEAR, and your deposit na 1,000 NEAR (your chance na 10%). The pool make 50 NEAR profit. If you win, you go pack your 1,000 NEAR + 48.5 NEAR jackpot! If you no win—your 1,000 NEAR still dey with you for the next draw.
feeDescription: Small fee of 3% from the PROFIT (no be your deposit!) dey help us maintain server and contract security. No hidden fee o!
shortDisclaimer: As you dey join, you confirm say you don reach 18 years and you no dey stay for countries where dem ban am. JOMO Pool na no-loss protocol, you fit withdraw your deposit anytime. Unstaking dey take ~3 days. Use am at your own risk.
fullTerms:
1. General Provisions: JOMO Pool na decentralized protocol for NEAR blockchain. As you dey use the site, you agree say developers only provide the interface to the smart contract and dem no hold responsibility for your funds.

2. Age Restrictions: You must reach at least 18 years.

3. Geographic Restrictions: You confirm say you no be resident of US, China, or other countries where law ban crypto protocols.

4. Withdrawal (Unstaking): You fit request withdrawal anytime. Because of how LiNEAR technically dey work, the unlocking process dey take around 3 days (4 epochs). Protocol no hold responsibility for network delay.

5. No Warranties: We provide the protocol "as is". We no guarantee say bugs no dey, even though the code don pass basic testing.

6. Responsibility: Na your full responsibility to pay tax for your country on top any winnings wey you get.
withdrawWarningDesc: Standard unstaking dey take ~3 days. ⚠️ You no fit start new unstake while one dey in progress. Claim your funds here when the timer end.
registerSuccess: Registration enter! You fit log in now after you verify your email.
generationError: E fail to generate wallet. Abeg try again.
nearAlert: Send only NEAR Protocol tokens to this address.
passLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
passAlphanumeric: Password must get both letter and number.
passSpecial: Password must get at least one special character (@, $, !, %, *, ?, &).
setup2faDesc: Enable 2FA to access your wallet. Scan this QR code with your authenticator app.
enter2faDesc: Open Google Authenticator and enter your 6-digit code.
privateStakingDesc: Maximum security inside your personal dashboard. 2FA protection, key encryption, and direct validator selection for staking.
noLossPoolDesc: Keep your principal, win the collective yield. Public access without registration.
lottoPoolDesc: Classic blockchain lottery. Dedicated domain to play.
encryptionDesc: All sensitive data and private keys dey encrypted at rest using military-grade standards.
mfaDesc: Time-based One-Time Passwords (TOTP) ensure say your account remain impenetrable even if dem compromise your password.
edgeDesc: Critical blockchain operations dey run on isolated, highly secure serverless Edge Functions.
activeUnstakeWarning: You already get active unstake request. Abeg wait for the timer and claim your funds before you withdraw more.
cantScanCode: You no fit scan? Copy this setup key:
restartSetup: Code no dey work? Start over
recoveryWarning: These codes na the ONLY way to recover your account if you lose your 2FA device. Each code dey work only once.
securityTipDesc: The safest method na to copy these codes put inside secure password manager (1Password, Bitwarden, Apple Keychain). If you download the .txt file, make you no keep am permanently on your device to prevent theft by malware.
recoveryFileFooter: Keep these ones safe! Each code fit only be used once.
recoverySuccessMsg: Success! Your 2FA don disable. Abeg log in again to set up new one.
invalidRecoveryCode: Invalid or you don use this recovery code before.
lostAuthenticatorBtn: You don lose access to Authenticator?
enterRecoveryCodeDesc: Enter one of your 8-character recovery codes to disable 2FA and get your access back.
pageRefreshedMsg: Page don refresh. If you don already copy the code go your Authenticator, just enter the 6 digits below to finish.
generateNewQr: I no copy am. Generate new code
insufficientBalanceError: Balance no reach. You no get enough shares (~0.0001 network fee).
invalidNearFormat: Invalid NEAR address format. Use only lowercase letters, numbers, '-', '_', or '.'.
invalidNearLength: Address must be between 2 and 64 characters.
emailInUse: Dem don register this email already. Abeg log in.
liquidHint: You receive liquid tokens (shares) instantly while you dey earn rewards
insufficientGasReserve: Balance no reach. Reserve {{reserve}} NEAR for gas.
gasReserveTooltip: This amount dey locked to guarantee storage and transaction fees for your wallet.
landingSubtitle: Your secure gateway to the NEAR ecosystem. Experience seamless staking and bulletproof security.
hwStep1Desc: Register and lock your account instantly. We enforce mandatory 2FA (Authenticator) and generate offline Recovery Codes to guarantee say only you get access to your vault.
hwStep2Desc: No seed phrases, no complex setups. A secure NEAR wallet is auto-generated the moment you sign up. Your private keys dey encrypted and safely managed in the cloud.
hwStep3Desc: Deposit and withdraw your NEAR anytime. JOMO charge symbolic 0.1% fee on wallet withdrawals. You get professional-grade asset protection at microscopic cost compared to industry standards.
stakingTitle: Earn Yield via LiNEAR with APY {{apy}}
stakingDesc: Put your NEAR to work safely. Stake your assets to receive liquid tokens and earn passive income.
stakingBullet1: Transparent Fee: Only 0.3% JOMO fee dem apply upon withdrawal.
stakingBullet2: Network Unstake: Standard un-staking dey take ~2 to 4 days.
stakingBullet3: One Request Limit: The network protocol permit only one active unstake request per user at a time.
cloudWalletDesc: The ultimate decentralized experience dey come. Soon, you go get option to take absolute control of your keys.
cloudWalletNote: Your private keys go be encrypted entirely client-side using your personal password. You go receive Secret Recovery Phrase (Seed Phrase) as your ultimate backup.
trueWeb3Rule: True Web3 Rule: You hold your own keys. If you lose both your password and your Seed Phrase, your funds don lost forever.
marketOverviewDesc: Track the real-time price dynamics of the NEAR token.

wallet_types.custodial_desc: Managed by JOMO for maximum simplicity. Secured by 2FA and professional infrastructure. We take care of the technical side.
wallet_types.non_custodial_desc: You get full control over your keys. Encrypted with your password. Note: JOMO no fit recover your funds if you lose your Seed Phrase and password.
wallet_types.security_note_desc: Keep your Seed Phrase safe. Loss of both password AND Seed Phrase = loss of funds.

staking.fee_notice: 3% service fee dem apply only to the net profit wey you earn.
staking.liquid_token_notice: You go receive liquid tokens directly to your wallet.
staking.liquid_token_info: You receive liquid tokens (shares) instantly while you earn rewards
staking.epoch_sync_error: The network dey finalize the current epoch. Abeg try claiming again later.

wallet_footer.shortDisclaimer: JOMO Vault provide secure interface for custodial storage and NEAR staking. Cryptocurrencies dey subject to high market risks. The standard network unstaking procedure dey take approximately 3 days. Abeg invest responsibly.
wallet_footer.copyright: © 2026 Crypto JOMO Vault. All rights reserved.
wallet_footer.fullTerms:
1. Nature of Services: JOMO Vault provide custodial wallet and interface to NEAR network smart contracts (including LiNEAR Protocol).
2. Risks: Cryptocurrency deposits dem no dey insured. You accept all risks associated with market volatility.
3. Withdrawals: The standard unstaking process (Delayed Unstake) na blockchain dey control am and e dey take about 4 epochs (~48-72 hours). We no fit expedite this process.
4. Fees: JOMO charge fixed service fee of 0.3% upon withdrawal. Network transaction fees (Gas) na user dey cover am.
5. Liability: The platform no dey liable for loss of funds due to the compromise of your credentials (password, 2FA).
